title: 秦始皇陵
hook: 地下埋着一支八千人的军队
outro_narration: 如果有一天秦始皇陵地宫被打开了，你觉得里面会有什么？评论区说说你的猜想

scenes.narration: 1974年3月，陕西临潼。几个农民在打井的时候，锄头碰到了坚硬的东西。他们以为是一块普通的陶片。没人能想到，这一锄头挖出了二十世纪最伟大的考古发现。
scenes.prompt_en: terracotta warrior, Qin dynasty clay soldier, half-buried in dark soil, emerging from underground pit, single shaft of golden sunlight piercing darkness, floating dust particles in light beam, archaeological excavation site, weathered earthen texture, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, cinematic close-up shot, warm terracotta orange and dark earth tones

scenes.narration: 地下埋着的，是八千多个真人大小的陶俑士兵。每一个都不一样——不同的脸型，不同的胡须，不同的发髻，甚至不同的鞋底纹路。两千两百年前，秦朝的工匠不是在做兵马俑，他们是在给每一个人塑像。
scenes.prompt_en: vast underground army formation, thousands of life-sized terracotta warrior statues, each soldier with unique facial features and distinct hairstyles and armor details, Qin dynasty military formation in rectangular battle array, rows of clay soldiers stretching into darkness, dramatic torchlight illumination, epic scale wide-angle composition, warm earthen clay tones, museum archaeological lighting

scenes.narration: 这支地下军团排成战斗阵型。前锋是三排弩兵，两翼和后卫是战车和骑兵，中间是步兵主力。秦始皇把他征服六国的那支军队，原样复制到了地下。他相信在另一个世界，自己还要继续打仗。
scenes.prompt_en: extreme close-up portrait of weathered terracotta warrior face, Qin dynasty, cracked clay surface texture, traces of original ancient paint pigment in crevices, detailed armor plates and headdress, individual craftsmanship visible, dramatic side lighting emphasizing sculptural details, shallow depth of field, museum artifact photography, warm terracotta and aged bronze tones

scenes.narration: 但兵马俑只是秦始皇陵的冰山一角。整个陵园的面积是五十六平方公里，相当于七十八个故宫。司马迁在史记里记载，地宫里有水银做的江河湖海，有宝石镶嵌的星空，还有机关弩箭防止盗墓贼。
scenes.prompt_en: grand underground imperial mausoleum palace, Qin Shi Huang tomb, ancient Chinese architecture with massive stone pillars, rivers of liquid mercury flowing with silvery metallic reflection, gemstone-encrusted ceiling depicting star constellations, crossbow traps and ancient mechanisms, epic fantasy scale, dramatic golden and mercury silver lighting, atmospheric volumetric fog, cinematic wide establishing shot

scenes.narration: 两千多年过去了，秦始皇的地宫至今没有被打开。1980年代考古队在封土堆上钻探取样，真的检测到了超高浓度的汞——司马迁说的水银河流，极有可能是真的。
scenes.prompt_en: underground mercury river in ancient tomb chamber, liquid silver metal flowing through dark stone channel, eerie toxic green glow reflecting off metallic surface, ancient Chinese alchemy atmosphere, mysterious archaeological discovery scene, dark cavern with mineral deposits, dramatic spotlight illumination on the mercury stream, moody cinematic lighting, metallic silver and emerald green tones

scenes.narration: 建造这个陵墓用了三十八年，动用了七十万劳工。但秦始皇本人只在位了十一年就死了。他十三岁登基，从登基那一年就开始给自己修陵墓。一个少年帝王，用一生时间，给自己挖了一座城。
scenes.prompt_en: young teenage Chinese emperor in elaborate imperial dragon robes, standing before a massive architectural blueprint scroll of his future mausoleum, ancient Qin dynasty palace interior with bronze vessels and silk curtains, boy king with determined expression, warm candlelight and golden hour sunbeams through lattice windows, dramatic historical composition, imperial gold and crimson color palette

scenes.narration: 如今兵马俑每年接待超过一千万游客。但每一个到过现场的人都会告诉你——站在一号坑前面往下看的时候，那种震撼是无法用语言描述的。八千个陶俑，两千两百年。它们就站在那里，面朝东方，等着他们的皇帝回来。
scenes.prompt_en: breathtaking modern museum interior built over vast archaeological excavation pit, thousands of terracotta warriors in formation facing east, elevated walkway with tiny silhouetted visitors looking down in awe, massive scale emphasizing human smallness, warm golden sunset light flooding through glass ceiling, dust motes dancing in light beams, emotional cinematic wide shot, warm earthen tones with golden highlights
